description: §Fase 29.g — Curated cross-stack corpus for the vertical-diagnostic CI lanes. Single source of truth shared by the 3 parallel lanes (vertical-policy / telemetry-sink / suggest-dict) so a regression in any one of them surfaces in exactly one lane. D-letter anchors documented per case.
d_letter_anchors: D1 — HIPAA + legal default-strict; fintech recovery+telemetry; generic OSS
D2 — Telemetry sink shape (OTel + Prom + audit) with privacy boundary
D3 — Vertical-suggest dict provenance per entry; ~50 terms first-cut
D4 — NO source text in any sink / response field
D8 — Multi-vertical safety (X never affects Y)
D9 — Generic tenants get OSS surface unchanged

policy_resolution_cases.name: hipaa_default_strict_with_telemetry
policy_resolution_cases.d_anchor: D1 + D2 — HIPAA risk posture + 21 CFR Part 11 audit trail

policy_resolution_cases.name: legal_default_strict_with_telemetry
policy_resolution_cases.d_anchor: D1 + D2 — FRE 502 + ABA Rule 1.6 reasoning-trace retention

policy_resolution_cases.name: fintech_recovery_with_telemetry
policy_resolution_cases.d_anchor: D1 + D2 — BSA / OFAC / MiFID II full diagnostic surface

policy_resolution_cases.name: generic_oss_surface_unchanged
policy_resolution_cases.d_anchor: D9 — generic tenants get OSS Fase 28 surface verbatim

telemetry_emission_cases.name: hipaa_error_emit_full_three_sink_fanout
telemetry_emission_cases.d_anchor: D2 + D4 + D8 — three-sink emit with tenant-scoped labels + privacy boundary

telemetry_emission_cases.name: fintech_warning_emit_severity_propagation
telemetry_emission_cases.d_anchor: D2 — warning severity propagates through all sinks

telemetry_emission_cases.name: legal_hint_severity_isolated_per_tenant
telemetry_emission_cases.d_anchor: D8 — tenant-A emit cannot affect tenant-B series

telemetry_emission_cases.name: generic_tenant_d9_no_emit
telemetry_emission_cases.d_anchor: D9 — generic tenants telemetry-off; no sink fires

suggest_dict_cases.name: hipaa_dict_first_cut_size_and_provenance
suggest_dict_cases.d_anchor: D3 — every entry has provenance referencing 45 CFR Parts 160/164

suggest_dict_cases.name: legal_dict_first_cut_size_and_provenance
suggest_dict_cases.d_anchor: D3 — provenance references FRE / FRCP / ABA Model Rules / canonical cases

suggest_dict_cases.name: fintech_dict_first_cut_size_and_provenance
suggest_dict_cases.d_anchor: D3 — provenance references 31 CFR / FATF / PCI DSS / ISO standards

suggest_dict_cases.name: generic_dict_d9_empty
suggest_dict_cases.d_anchor: D9 — generic tenants have no vertical dict; OSS surface unchanged

suggest_dict_cases.name: d8_no_cross_vertical_contamination
suggest_dict_cases.d_anchor: D8 — vertical terms never overlap across verticals

compliance_gate_cases.name: errors_exceed_default_threshold_fails
compliance_gate_cases.d_anchor: D5 — default max_errors=0; any error fails

compliance_gate_cases.name: warnings_below_threshold_passes
compliance_gate_cases.d_anchor: D5 — adopter can raise warning threshold

compliance_gate_cases.name: hint_with_fail_on_hint_fails
compliance_gate_cases.d_anchor: D5 — fail_on_hint opt-in for HIPAA/legal posture

compliance_gate_cases.name: malformed_payload_mode_fails_input
compliance_gate_cases.d_anchor: D5 — malformed payloads surface as configuration error, not compliance failure
